campaign_name: Spitfire Deathmask II Wheel Close-up US
audience: Skateboarders who want Formula Four wheels for real sessions
creative_direction: Spitfire Deathmask II glow wheel in real street skating. Dark grit. Photoreal. No campaign text in the image.

products.name: Wheel on Trucks Close-up
products.asset_hint: Keep this exact skateboard truck and axle geometry. Replace the wheels with the glow Spitfire Deathmask II wheel from the other refs. Flip travel so the board rolls the opposite direction. Low angle, fill the frame with the near wheel. Photoreal. No text.
products.notes: Seed from real truck anatomy; swap glow wheel; opposite travel.
